author: Haroen Viaene
subject: docs(examples): make sure e-commerce example can be ran on codeSandBox (#3967)
body:
* docs(examples): make sure e-commerce example can be ran on codesandbox

This wasn't possible before because the array generated from spreading a form element got transformed into .slice which it didn't have.

If downlevelIteration is true & dom.iterable is true the code will work however!

see https://github.com/codesandbox/codesandbox-client/issues/2166#issuecomment-513210419

* chore: we need to add required ones from the root too
